summary: Iteration 115: 4-Layer Caching System testing complete. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). All cache endpoints working correctly. Existing functionality preserved.
critical_code_review_comments: cache.py: Well-structured 3-layer cache system with ImageCache, ProjectCache, LLMCache classes
cache.py: ImageCache has disk persistence + in-memory hot layer (50 items max), SHA256 dedup, prewarm support
cache.py: ProjectCache has read-through pattern with 5min TTL, write-behind batching (3s delay), dirty tracking
cache.py: LLMCache is content-addressable with 1hr TTL, uses SHA256 hash of prompt + image hashes
cache.py: Singleton instances exported (image_cache, project_cache, llm_cache)
studio.py: GET /api/studio/cache/stats returns stats for all 3 layers (no auth required)
studio.py: POST /api/studio/cache/flush forces flush and cleanup (no auth required)
server.py: on_event('shutdown') flushes project_cache to DB
continuity_director.py: Uses image_cache.download() and image_cache.prewarm() for avatar/frame images
continuity_director.py: Uses llm_cache.get()/put() for LLM response caching
smart_editor.py: Uses image_cache.download() for image downloads
storyboard_inpaint.py: Uses image_cache.download() for image downloads
useProjectCache.js: Frontend SWR cache with 30s stale time, 5min max cache time
useProjectCache.js: Image preloader for adjacent frames, invalidateCache(), optimisticUpdate() functions
seed_data_creation: None - used existing project fce897cf6ba3 (has 20 panels with 6 frames each)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 115 verified 4-layer caching system: 1) GET /api/studio/cache/stats returns {image_cache: {hot_count, disk_count, disk_size_mb}, project_cache: {cached_tenants, dirty_tenants, entries}, llm_cache: {entries, size_kb}} - NO AUTH REQUIRED, 2) POST /api/studio/cache/flush forces flush and cleanup - NO AUTH REQUIRED, 3) Project cache read-through: first call hits Supabase, subsequent calls served from memory (5min TTL), 4) Project cache write-behind: saves update cache immediately, DB write batched (3s delay or flush_now=True), 5) Image cache uses /tmp/agentzz_cache/images/, LLM cache uses /tmp/agentzz_cache/llm/, project cache is in-memory only, 6) All existing endpoints still work: /api/auth/login, /api/studio/projects, /api/studio/projects/{id}/status, /api/studio/projects/{id}/storyboard, /api/studio/projects/{id}/continuity/status. Caching is transparent - no behavior changes to existing functionality.

project_cache_read_through.behavior: First call hits Supabase, subsequent calls served from memory cache (5min TTL)

project_cache_write_behind.behavior: Updates cache immediately, DB write batched (3s delay or flush_now=True)
